title: Guns&Fun
description: 🔥TaCZ + Superb Warfare! Tanks, Military Planes, Armored Vehicles!  Shoot With Over 100 Guns!  Equip Highly Detailed Armors! 300+ Mobs To Shoot!|🌐 Co-op • ✨ Shaders
body:
![Guns And Fun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8856fea84a22af89b931de9c5b159b911de4de57.webp) **
Military Themed Modpack - Gun, Vehicles, Body Armor, Aircraft, Fighting!
**

💥 Quality Guns

100+ High Detail firearms -> M4A1, Glock, Aug, AK47, Rocket Launcher and more...

🚓 Vehicles

15+ Powerful vehicles - military aircraft - armored tanks, - Fast boats. - 5+ Powerful Turrets

✈️ Aircraft

15+ Powerful vehicles - military aircraft - armored tanks, - Fast boats. - 5+ Powerful Turrets

🪖 Realistic Gear

10+ realistic military themed armor sets, Real life weapons. Crowbars, Machette, katanas, Cammo

☠️ Fight

Over 300 monster were added. FIGHT, SURVIVE, CONQUER. some of them are every dangerous

🗺️ Explore Structures

Hundreds of new structures for you to explore, Get better loot and fight monsters
--- ### ⚠️ Can my PC handle this modpack? Yes! We crafted this modpack to be light weight and optimized. To get even more performance you can try these things:
Tips To Get Better Performance - Disable Shaders: Options -> Video Settings -> Oculus -> Shaders: Disabled - Disable Minimap: Mods -> Xaeros's Minimap -> Config -> Minimap: Off - Lower Render Distance: Options -> Video settings -> Render distance - Lower Simulation Distance: Options -> Video settings -> Simulation distance - Allocate More Ram We recommend 4-6gb - Update All your drivers
